label: http api • tiny max_tokens truncates with finish_reason length
query: Tell me the full story of the three little pigs in as much detail as you can.
notes: The truncation contract: a story prompt that cannot possibly complete in 16 tokens must come back truncated with finish_reason 'length' (never 'stop', never an error). Also pins that usage.completion_tokens respects the cap. Off-CI (needs a model).
